name: Haru Hyuga (Naruto oc)
description:
Haru Hyuga

.

Things about him/family stuff: He's a bit mixed; his mother is obv white + Japanese, his father is more dark skinned + Japanese. And that just simply makes him a bit mixed, he isn't all that pale either, he has a good bit of color to his skin. (+ he kind of looks like Neji just with some color and an actual personality :3)

.

Favorite food: Sushi + Sashimi, any stir-fry food, tempura, Dango dumplings, Yakitori, Curry Rice, and Katsu.

.

Haru isn't really related to anyone in the head of the Hyuga clan, but he's not really part of the side of the Hyuga who aren't in the head of the family tree (if that makes sense)

.

As for his personality: He's a bit similar to how Neji's personality is, but Haru is more nice than Neji. Haru can put out authority in his tone of voice when nobody seems to listen to him when it's needed.

.

Have fun 👅 I didn't know what to do for this so it's a free scenario of your choosing ❤ also I hope this doesn't like accidentally offend anyone 😬
creator: Zaerare
